title: Crispy French Keto Cassava Cakes
description: A crispy and savory keto snack made with casabe, perfect for a keto diet. Serve as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Grate the casabe and place it in a bowl.
Add the French onion soup mix, crispy fried shallots, and shredded cheese to the bowl. Mix well.
Crack the egg into the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Divide the dough into 4 equal parts and shape each part into a patty.
Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot with a side of salad.
Optional: Top with additional crispy fried shallots and shredded cheese.
